positive: Minimalist illustration of a friendly woodland creature, specifically a smiling fox curled up inside a stylized, glowing crescent moon. The fox should have clean, sharp silhouette lines and vibrant orange and white fur details. The style must be highly contrasted, modern vector art with a pop-art influence. Composition should be centered, focusing on the fox and moon, suitable for a t-shirt graphic. Limited color palette: deep indigo blue, soft gold, vibrant orange, and stark white. Use a clean background or negative space for maximum print impact. High contrast lighting, smooth linework, flat colors, highly detailed, concept art for merchandise, 8k.
